    |    (This value is aggregated up the tree and broadcasted down)
    |    Global Discomfort Sum = 21.000000
    |    Num Agents = 10

    |               = 21.000000 / 10 = 2.100000
    |    Weighted Local = beta * Local Cost
    |                   = 0.00 * 2.100000 = 0.000000

    | 3. Unfairness Calculation (Standard Deviation of Discomfort):
    |    Global Discomfort Sum Sqr = 71.000000
